events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the exceeded sidewall pressure/jamming shows the pull-tension/fill/bend-geometry planning step was skipped or inadequate before pulling began — a sequence violation. Decision is `fail` (high risk) with required corrective actions (stop pulling, inspect/megger the withdrawn conductors, recalculate fill/tension, add pull points/lubricant, replace any damaged conductors, then re-verify NEC 200.6/210.5 identification before termination).
